title: Creator Studio Settings
description: Controls the pet generation backend and import behavior for the Creator Studio example extension.

backend.title: Generation Mode
backend.description: Choose fixture workflow QA or the host-owned image Provider path for new Creator Studio runs.

autoActivateAfterImport.title: Auto activate imported pet
autoActivateAfterImport.description: Activate the imported pet pack after a run is approved and imported.

servicePort.title: Dashboard service port
servicePort.description: Loopback port used by the Creator Studio dashboard service.
